name: Open Action Center in Windows 10
snippet:
This tutorial will show you how to open and use Action Center for notifications and quick actions in Windows 10. Enable or Disable Action Center in Windows 10 | Tutorials Add or Remove Quick Actions in Action Center in Windows 10 More results from www.tenforums.com
In Windows 10, action center is where to find your app notifications, as well as quick actions, which give you quick access to commonly used settings and apps. The action center will show you all of your past notifications until you clear them.

name: How to Use and Customize the Windows 10 Action Center

name: Customize Quick Action Buttons in Action Center of Windows 10
snippet: Open Settings. Go to System - Notifications & actions. On the right, click the Add or remove quick actions link below the Quick actions list.
